contents:
Class IsDGraph {A : Type} `{IsGraph A} (D : A -> Type)
  := DHom : forall {a b : A}, (a $-> b) -> D a -> D b -> Type.

Definition dcat_postcomp {A : Type} {D : A -> Type} `{IsD01Cat A D} {a b c : A}
  {g : b $-> c} {a' : D a} {b' : D b} {c' : D c} (g' : DHom g b' c')
  : forall (f : a $-> b), DHom f a' b' -> DHom (g $o f) a' c'
  := fun _ f' => g' $o' f'.

Definition dcat_precomp {A : Type} {D : A -> Type} `{IsD01Cat A D} {a b c : A}
  {f : a $-> b} {a' : D a} {b' : D b} {c' : D c} (f' : DHom f a' b')
  : forall (g : b $-> c), DHom g b' c' -> DHom (g $o f) a' c'
  := fun _ g' => g' $o' f'.

Class IsD0Gpd {A : Type} `{Is0Gpd A} (D : A -> Type)
  `{!IsDGraph D, !IsD01Cat D}
  := dgpd_rev : forall {a b : A} {f : a $== b} {a' : D a} {b' : D b},
                DHom f a' b' -> DHom (f^$) b' a'.

goals.conclusion: DHom (Hom_path p) a' b'
DHom (Hom_path p) a' b'

contents:
Definition DGpdHom_path {A : Type} {D : A -> Type} `{IsD0Gpd A D} {a b : A}
  (p : a = b) {a' : D a} {b': D b} (p' : transport D p a' = b')
  : DGpdHom (GpdHom_path p) a' b'
  := DHom_path p p'.
(** A displayed 0-functor [F'] over a 0-functor [F] acts on displayed objects and 1-cells and satisfies no axioms. *)
Arguments dfmap {A B DA _ _ DB _ _} F {_} F' {_ _ _ _ _ _} f'.

Definition DMonic {A} {D : A -> Type} `{IsD1Cat A D} {b c : A}
  {f : b $-> c} {mon : Monic f} {b' : D b} {c' : D c} (f' : DHom f b' c')
  := forall (a : A) (g h : a $-> b) (p : f $o g $== f $o h) (a' : D a)
      (g' : DHom g a' b') (h' : DHom h a' b'),
      DGpdHom p (f' $o' g') (f' $o' h') -> DGpdHom (mon a g h p) g' h'.

Definition DEpic {A} {D : A -> Type} `{IsD1Cat A D} {a b : A}
  {f : a $-> b} {epi : Epic f} {a' : D a} {b' : D b} (f' : DHom f a' b')
  := forall (c : A) (g h : b $-> c) (p : g $o f $== h $o f) (c' : D c)
      (g' : DHom g b' c') (h' : DHom h b' c'),
      DGpdHom p (g' $o' f') (h' $o' f') -> DGpdHom (epi c g h p) g' h'.

Instance isgraph_total {A : Type} (D : A -> Type) `{IsDGraph A D}
  : IsGraph (sig D).

goals.conclusion: IsGraph {x : _ & D x}
IsGraph {x : _ & D x}
{x : _ & D x} -> {x : _ & D x} -> Type
Type

contents: exact {f : a $-> b & DHom f a' b'}.

Instance is01cat_total {A : Type} (D : A -> Type) `{IsD01Cat A D}
  : Is01Cat (sig D).

goals.conclusion: Is01Cat {x : _ & D x}
Is01Cat {x : _ & D x}
forall a : {x : _ & D x}, a $-> a
forall a b c : {x : _ & D x}, (b $-> c) -> (a $-> b) -> a $-> c
forall a : {x : _ & D x}, a $-> a
forall a b c : {x : _ & D x}, (b $-> c) -> (a $-> b) -> a $-> c

contents: intros [a a'] [b b'] [c c'] [g g'] [f f'].

Instance is0gpd_total {A : Type} (D : A -> Type) `{IsD0Gpd A D}
  : Is0Gpd (sig D).

goals.conclusion: Is0Gpd {x : _ & D x}
Is0Gpd {x : _ & D x}
forall a b : {x : _ & D x}, (a $-> b) -> b $-> a

forall a b : {x : _ & D x}, (a $-> b) -> a.1 $-> b.1

goals.conclusion: Is2Graph {x : _ & D x}
Is2Graph {x : _ & D x}

contents: exact ({p : f $-> g & DHom p f' g'}).

goals.conclusion: Is0Functor (functor_sigma F F')

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)

goals.conclusion: Is0Functor (functor_sigma F F')

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)

goals.conclusion:
forall a b : {x : _ & DA x},
(a $-> b) -> functor_sigma F F' a $-> functor_sigma F F' b

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)

goals.conclusion:
((a; a') $-> (b; b')) ->
functor_sigma F F' (a; a') $-> functor_sigma F F' (b; b')

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, DA a0 -> DB (F a0)

goals.conclusion: functor_sigma F F' (a; a') $-> functor_sigma F F' (b; b')

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, DA a0 -> DB (F a0)

contents: exact (fmap F f; dfmap F F' f').

Instance is1cat_total {A : Type} (D : A -> Type) `{IsD1Cat A D}
  : Is1Cat (sig D).

goals.conclusion: Is1Cat {x : _ & D x}
Is1Cat {x : _ & D x}
forall (a b c : {x : _ & D x}) (g : b $-> c), Is0Functor (cat_postcomp a g)
forall (a b c : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b), Is0Functor (cat_precomp c f)

forall (a b c d : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d), h $o g $o f $== h $o (g $o f)

forall (a b c d : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d), h $o (g $o f) $== h $o g $o f
forall (a b : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b), Id b $o f $== f
forall (a b : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b), f $o Id a $== f
forall (a b c : {x : _ & D x}) (g : b $-> c), Is0Functor (cat_postcomp a g)
Is0Functor (cat_postcomp (a; a') (f; f'))

forall a0 b0 : (a; a') $-> (b; b'),
(a0 $-> b0) ->
cat_postcomp (a; a') (f; f') a0 $-> cat_postcomp (a; a') (f; f') b0
cat_postcomp (a; a') (f; f') (g; g') $-> cat_postcomp (a; a') (f; f') (h; h')
forall (a b c : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b), Is0Functor (cat_precomp c f)
Is0Functor (cat_precomp (c; c') (f; f'))

forall a0 b0 : (b; b') $-> (c; c'),
(a0 $-> b0) ->
cat_precomp (c; c') (f; f') a0 $-> cat_precomp (c; c') (f; f') b0
cat_precomp (c; c') (f; f') (g; g') $-> cat_precomp (c; c') (f; f') (h; h')

forall (a b c d : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d), h $o g $o f $== h $o (g $o f)

contents: intros [a a'] [b b'] [c c'] [d d'] [f f'] [g g'] [h h'].
exact (cat_assoc f g h; dcat_assoc f' g' h').

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c d : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d), h $o (g $o f) $== h $o g $o f

contents: intros [a a'] [b b'] [c c'] [d d'] [f f'] [g g'] [h h'].
exact (cat_assoc_opp f g h; dcat_assoc_opp f' g' h').

goals.conclusion: forall (a b : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b), Id b $o f $== f
forall (a b : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b), f $o Id a $== f

Instance is1functor_pr1 {A : Type} {D : A -> Type} `{IsD1Cat A D}
  : Is1Functor (pr1 : sig D -> A).

goals.conclusion: Is1Functor (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A)
Is1Functor (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A)

forall (a b : {x : _ & D x}) (f g : a $-> b),
f $== g ->
fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) f $== fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) g
forall a : {x : _ & D x}, fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) (Id a) $== Id a.1

forall (a b c : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) (g $o f) $==
fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) g $o fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) f

forall (a b : {x : _ & D x}) (f g : a $-> b),
f $== g ->
fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) f $== fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) g

contents: intros [a a'] [b b'] [f f'] [g g'] [p p'].

goals.conclusion:
fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) (f; f') $==
fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) (g; g')
forall a : {x : _ & D x}, fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) (Id a) $== Id a.1
fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) (Id (a; a')) $== Id (a; a').1

forall (a b c : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) (g $o f) $==
fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) g $o fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) f

contents: intros [a a'] [b b'] [c c'] [f f'] [g g'].

goals.conclusion:
fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) ((g; g') $o (f; f')) $==
fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) (g; g') $o
fmap (pr1 : {x : _ & D x} -> A) (f; f')

contents:
(* If in the future we make a [Build_Is1Cat_Strong'] that lets the user omit the second proof of associativity, this shows how it can be recovered from the original proof:
Definition dcat_assoc_opp_strong {A : Type} {D : A -> Type} `{IsD1Cat_Strong A D}
  {a b c d : A}  {f : a $-> b} {g : b $-> c} {h : c $-> d}
  {a' : D a} {b' : D b} {c' : D c} {d' : D d}
  (f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g b' c') (h' : DHom h c' d')
  : (transport (fun k => DHom k a' d') (cat_assoc_opp_strong f g h)
    (h' $o' (g' $o' f'))) = (h' $o' g') $o' f'.
Proof.
  exact (moveR_transport_V (fun k => DHom k a' d') (cat_assoc_strong f g h) _ _).
  exact ((dcat_assoc_strong f' g' h')^).
Defined.
*)

Instance isd1cat_isd1catstrong {A : Type} (D : A -> Type)
  `{IsD1Cat_Strong A D} : IsD1Cat D.

goals.conclusion: IsD1Cat D
IsD1Cat D

forall (a b c d : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (h : c $-> d) 
(a' : D a) (b' : D b) (c' : D c) (d' : D d) (f' : DHom f a' b')
(g' : DHom g b' c') (h' : DHom h c' d'),
DHom (cat_assoc f g h) (h' $o' g' $o' f') (h' $o' (g' $o' f'))

forall (a b c d : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (h : c $-> d) 
(a' : D a) (b' : D b) (c' : D c) (d' : D d) (f' : DHom f a' b')
(g' : DHom g b' c') (h' : DHom h c' d'),
DHom (cat_assoc_opp f g h) (h' $o' (g' $o' f')) (h' $o' g' $o' f')

forall (a b : A) (f : a $-> b) (a' : D a) (b' : D b) 
(f' : DHom f a' b'), DHom (cat_idl f) (DId b' $o' f') f'

forall (a b : A) (f : a $-> b) (a' : D a) (b' : D b) 
(f' : DHom f a' b'), DHom (cat_idr f) (f' $o' DId a') f'

forall (a b c d : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (h : c $-> d) 
(a' : D a) (b' : D b) (c' : D c) (d' : D d) (f' : DHom f a' b')
(g' : DHom g b' c') (h' : DHom h c' d'),
DHom (cat_assoc f g h) (h' $o' g' $o' f') (h' $o' (g' $o' f'))

contents: intros a b c d f g h a' b' c' d' f' g' h'.

goals.conclusion: DHom (cat_assoc f g h) (h' $o' g' $o' f') (h' $o' (g' $o' f'))

contents: exact (DHom_path (cat_assoc_strong f g h) (dcat_assoc_strong f' g' h')).

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c d : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (h : c $-> d) 
(a' : D a) (b' : D b) (c' : D c) (d' : D d) (f' : DHom f a' b')
(g' : DHom g b' c') (h' : DHom h c' d'),
DHom (cat_assoc_opp f g h) (h' $o' (g' $o' f')) (h' $o' g' $o' f')

contents: intros a b c d f g h a' b' c' d' f' g' h'.

goals.conclusion: DHom (cat_assoc_opp f g h) (h' $o' (g' $o' f')) (h' $o' g' $o' f')

contents: exact (DHom_path (cat_assoc_opp_strong f g h) (dcat_assoc_opp_strong f' g' h')).

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b : A) (f : a $-> b) (a' : D a) (b' : D b) 
(f' : DHom f a' b'), DHom (cat_idl f) (DId b' $o' f') f'

contents: intros a b f a' b' f'.

goals.conclusion: DHom (cat_idl f) (DId b' $o' f') f'

forall (a b : A) (f : a $-> b) (a' : D a) (b' : D b) 
(f' : DHom f a' b'), DHom (cat_idr f) (f' $o' DId a') f'

contents: intros a b f a' b' f'.

goals.conclusion: DHom (cat_idr f) (f' $o' DId a') f'
Is1Cat_Strong {x : _ & D x}
Is1Cat_Strong {x : _ & D x}

forall (a b c d : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d), h $o g $o f = h $o (g $o f)

forall (a b c d : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d), h $o (g $o f) = h $o g $o f
forall (a b : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b), Id b $o f = f
forall (a b : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b), f $o Id a = f

forall (a b c d : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d), h $o g $o f = h $o (g $o f)

contents: intros aa' bb' cc' dd' [f f'] [g g'] [h h'].

exact (path_sigma' _
            (cat_assoc_strong f g h) (dcat_assoc_strong f' g' h')).

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c d : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d), h $o (g $o f) = h $o g $o f

contents: intros aa' bb' cc' dd' [f f'] [g g'] [h h'].

exact (path_sigma' _
            (cat_assoc_opp_strong f g h) (dcat_assoc_opp_strong f' g' h')).

goals.conclusion: forall (a b : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b), Id b $o f = f
Id bb' $o (f; f') = (f; f')
forall (a b : {x : _ & D x}) (f : a $-> b), f $o Id a = f
(f; f') $o Id aa' = (f; f')

contents:
Arguments dfmap2 {A B DA _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ DB _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _}
  F {_ _} F' {_ _ a b f g p a' b' f' g'} p'.

Arguments dfmap_id {A B DA _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ DB _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _}
  F {_ _} F' {_ _ a} a'.

Arguments dfmap_comp {A B DA _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ DB _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _}
  F {_ _} F' {_ _ a b c f g a' b' c'} f' g'.

goals.conclusion: Is1Functor (functor_sigma F F')

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)

goals.conclusion: Is1Functor (functor_sigma F F')

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b : {x : _ & DA x}) (f g : a $-> b),
f $== g -> fmap (functor_sigma F F') f $== fmap (functor_sigma F F') g

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)

goals.conclusion:
forall a : {x : _ & DA x},
fmap (functor_sigma F F') (Id a) $== Id (functor_sigma F F' a)

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c : {x : _ & DA x}) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (functor_sigma F F') (g $o f) $==
fmap (functor_sigma F F') g $o fmap (functor_sigma F F') f

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b : {x : _ & DA x}) (f g : a $-> b),
f $== g -> fmap (functor_sigma F F') f $== fmap (functor_sigma F F') g

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)

contents: intros [a a'] [b b'] [f f'] [g g'] [p p'].

goals.conclusion: fmap (functor_sigma F F') (f; f') $== fmap (functor_sigma F F') (g; g')

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, DA a0 -> DB (F a0)

goals.conclusion:
DHom (fmap2 F p) (fmap (functor_sigma F F') (f; f')).2
  (fmap (functor_sigma F F') (g; g')).2

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, DA a0 -> DB (F a0)

goals.conclusion:
forall a : {x : _ & DA x},
fmap (functor_sigma F F') (Id a) $== Id (functor_sigma F F' a)

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)

goals.conclusion: fmap (functor_sigma F F') (Id (a; a')) $== Id (functor_sigma F F' (a; a'))

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, DA a0 -> DB (F a0)

contents: exact (fmap_id F a; dfmap_id F F' a').

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c : {x : _ & DA x}) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c),
fmap (functor_sigma F F') (g $o f) $==
fmap (functor_sigma F F') g $o fmap (functor_sigma F F') f

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)

contents: intros [a a'] [b b'] [c c'] [f f'] [g g'].

goals.conclusion:
fmap (functor_sigma F F') ((g; g') $o (f; f')) $==
fmap (functor_sigma F F') (g; g') $o fmap (functor_sigma F F') (f; f')

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, DA a0 -> DB (F a0)

contents: exact (fmap_comp F f g; dfmap_comp F F' f' g').

goals.conclusion: IsD0Functor idmap (fun a : A => idmap)
IsD0Functor idmap (fun a : A => idmap)

contents: intros a b f a' b' f'.

goals.conclusion: DHom (fmap idmap f) a' b'
IsD1Functor idmap (fun a : A => idmap)
IsD1Functor idmap (fun a : A => idmap)

forall (a b : A) (f g : a $-> b) (p : f $== g) (a' : DA a) 
(b' : DA b) (f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g a' b'),
DHom p f' g' ->
DHom (fmap2 idmap p) (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) f')
  (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) g')

forall (a : A) (a' : DA a),
DHom (fmap_id idmap a) (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) (DId a')) (DId a')

forall (a b c : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (a' : DA a) 
(b' : DA b) (c' : DA c) (f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g b' c'),
DHom (fmap_comp idmap f g) (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) (g' $o' f'))
  (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) g' $o'
   dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) f')

forall (a b : A) (f g : a $-> b) (p : f $== g) (a' : DA a) 
(b' : DA b) (f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g a' b'),
DHom p f' g' ->
DHom (fmap2 idmap p) (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) f')
  (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) g')

contents: intros a b f g p a' b' f' g' p'.

goals.conclusion:
DHom (fmap2 idmap p) (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) f')
  (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) g')

forall (a : A) (a' : DA a),
DHom (fmap_id idmap a) (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) (DId a')) (DId a')
DHom (fmap_id idmap a) (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) (DId a')) (DId a')

forall (a b c : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (a' : DA a) 
(b' : DA b) (c' : DA c) (f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g b' c'),
DHom (fmap_comp idmap f g) (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) (g' $o' f'))
  (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) g' $o'
   dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) f')

contents: intros a b c f g a' b' c' f' g'.

goals.conclusion:
DHom (fmap_comp idmap f g) (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) (g' $o' f'))
  (dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) g' $o'
   dfmap idmap (fun a0 : A => idmap) f')
IsD0Functor (fun _ : A => x) (fun (a : A) (_ : DA a) => x')
IsD0Functor (fun _ : A => x) (fun (a : A) (_ : DA a) => x')

contents: intros a b f a' b' f'.

goals.conclusion: DHom (fmap (fun _ : A => x) f) x' x'
IsD1Functor (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a : B) (_ : DB a) => x')
IsD1Functor (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a : B) (_ : DB a) => x')

forall (a b : B) (f g : a $-> b) (p : f $== g) (a' : DB a) 
(b' : DB b) (f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g a' b'),
DHom p f' g' ->
DHom (fmap2 (fun _ : B => x) p)
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') f')
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') g')

forall (a : B) (a' : DB a),
DHom (fmap_id (fun _ : B => x) a)
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') (DId a'))
  (DId ((fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') a a'))

forall (a b c : B) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (a' : DB a) 
(b' : DB b) (c' : DB c) (f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g b' c'),
DHom (fmap_comp (fun _ : B => x) f g)
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') (g' $o' f'))
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') g' $o'
   dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') f')

forall (a b : B) (f g : a $-> b) (p : f $== g) (a' : DB a) 
(b' : DB b) (f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g a' b'),
DHom p f' g' ->
DHom (fmap2 (fun _ : B => x) p)
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') f')
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') g')

contents: intros a b f g p a' b' f' g' p'.

goals.conclusion:
DHom (fmap2 (fun _ : B => x) p)
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') f')
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') g')

forall (a : B) (a' : DB a),
DHom (fmap_id (fun _ : B => x) a)
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') (DId a'))
  (DId ((fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') a a'))

DHom (fmap_id (fun _ : B => x) a)
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') (DId a'))
  (DId ((fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') a a'))

forall (a b c : B) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (a' : DB a) 
(b' : DB b) (c' : DB c) (f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g b' c'),
DHom (fmap_comp (fun _ : B => x) f g)
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') (g' $o' f'))
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') g' $o'
   dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') f')

contents: intros a b c f g a' b' c' f' g'.

goals.conclusion:
DHom (fmap_comp (fun _ : B => x) f g)
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') (g' $o' f'))
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') g' $o'
   dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') f')

DHom (cat_idl (Id x))
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') g' $o'
   dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') f')
  (dfmap (fun _ : B => x) (fun (a0 : B) (_ : DB a0) => x') (g' $o' f'))

contents:
Context {A B C : Type} {DA : A -> Type} {DB : B -> Type} {DC : C -> Type}
    (F : A -> B) (G : B -> C)
    (F' : forall (a : A), DA a -> DB (F a))
    (G' : forall (b : B), DB b -> DC (G b)).

goals.conclusion: IsD0Functor (G o F) (fun (a : A) (a' : DA a) => (G' (F a) o F' a) a')

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)
forall b : B, DB b -> DC (G b)

goals.conclusion: IsD0Functor (G o F) (fun (a : A) (a' : DA a) => (G' (F a) o F' a) a')

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)
forall b : B, DB b -> DC (G b)

contents: intros a b f a' b' f'.

goals.conclusion: DHom (fmap (G o F) f) (G' (F a) (F' a a')) (G' (F b) (F' b b'))

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, DA a0 -> DB (F a0)
forall b0 : B, DB b0 -> DC (G b0)

contents: exact (dfmap G G' (dfmap F F' f')).

goals.conclusion: IsD1Functor (G o F) (fun (a : A) (a' : DA a) => (G' (F a) o F' a) a')

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)
forall b : B, DB b -> DC (G b)

goals.conclusion: IsD1Functor (G o F) (fun (a : A) (a' : DA a) => (G' (F a) o F' a) a')

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)
forall b : B, DB b -> DC (G b)

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b : A) (f g : a $-> b) (p : f $== g) (a' : DA a) 
(b' : DA b) (f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g a' b'),
DHom p f' g' ->
DHom (fmap2 (G o F) p)
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) f')
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) g')

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)
forall b : B, DB b -> DC (G b)

goals.conclusion:
forall (a : A) (a' : DA a),
DHom (fmap_id (G o F) a)
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) 
     (DId a'))
  (DId ((fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) a a'))

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)
forall b : B, DB b -> DC (G b)

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (a' : DA a) 
(b' : DA b) (c' : DA c) (f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g b' c'),
DHom (fmap_comp (G o F) f g)
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) 
     (g' $o' f'))
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) g' $o'
   dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) f')

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)
forall b : B, DB b -> DC (G b)

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b : A) (f g : a $-> b) (p : f $== g) (a' : DA a) 
(b' : DA b) (f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g a' b'),
DHom p f' g' ->
DHom (fmap2 (G o F) p)
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) f')
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) g')

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)
forall b : B, DB b -> DC (G b)

contents: intros a b f g p a' b' f' g' p'.

goals.conclusion:
DHom (fmap2 (G o F) p)
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) f')
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) g')

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, DA a0 -> DB (F a0)
forall b0 : B, DB b0 -> DC (G b0)

goals.conclusion:
forall (a : A) (a' : DA a),
DHom (fmap_id (G o F) a)
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) 
     (DId a'))
  (DId ((fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) a a'))

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)
forall b : B, DB b -> DC (G b)

goals.conclusion:
DHom (fmap_id (G o F) a)
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) 
     (DId a'))
  (DId ((fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) a a'))

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, DA a0 -> DB (F a0)
forall b : B, DB b -> DC (G b)

contents: exact (dfmap2 _ _ (dfmap_id F F' a') $@' dfmap_id G G' _).

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c : A) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) (a' : DA a) 
(b' : DA b) (c' : DA c) (f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g b' c'),
DHom (fmap_comp (G o F) f g)
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) 
     (g' $o' f'))
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) g' $o'
   dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) f')

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, DA a -> DB (F a)
forall b : B, DB b -> DC (G b)

contents: intros a b c f g a' b' c' f' g'.

goals.conclusion:
DHom (fmap_comp (G o F) f g)
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) 
     (g' $o' f'))
  (dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) g' $o'
   dfmap (fun x : A => G (F x))
     (fun (a0 : A) (a'0 : DA a0) => (G' (F a0) o F' a0) a'0) f')

hypotheses.type: forall a0 : A, DA a0 -> DB (F a0)
forall b0 : B, DB b0 -> DC (G b0)

contents: exact (dfmap2 _ _ (dfmap_comp F F' f' g') $@' dfmap_comp G G' _ _).

Local Definition pointwise_prod {A B : Type} (DA : A -> Type) (DB : B -> Type)
  (x : A * B) := DA (fst x) * DB (snd x).

goals.conclusion: IsDGraph (pointwise_prod DA DB)
IsDGraph (pointwise_prod DA DB)

contents: intros [a1 b1] [a2 b2] [f g] [a1' b1'] [a2' b2'].

goals.conclusion: Type

contents: exact (DHom f a1' a2' * DHom g b1' b2').

goals.conclusion: IsD01Cat (pointwise_prod DA DB)
IsD01Cat (pointwise_prod DA DB)
forall (a : A * B) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a), DHom (Id a) a' a'

forall (a b c : A * B) (g : b $-> c) (f : a $-> b)
(a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a) (b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b)
(c' : pointwise_prod DA DB c),
DHom g b' c' -> DHom f a' b' -> DHom (g $o f) a' c'
forall (a : A * B) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a), DHom (Id a) a' a'
DHom (Id (a, b)) (a', b') (a', b')

forall (a b c : A * B) (g : b $-> c) (f : a $-> b)
(a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a) (b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b)
(c' : pointwise_prod DA DB c),
DHom g b' c' -> DHom f a' b' -> DHom (g $o f) a' c'
IsD0Gpd (pointwise_prod DA DB)
IsD0Gpd (pointwise_prod DA DB)

contents: intros [a1 b1] [a2 b2] [f g] [a1' b1'] [a2' b2'] [f' g'].

IsD2Graph (pointwise_prod DA DB)

IsD1Cat (pointwise_prod DA DB)
IsD1Cat (pointwise_prod DA DB)

forall (a b : A * B) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a)
(b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b), IsD01Cat (fun f : a $-> b => DHom f a' b')

forall (a b : A * B) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a)
(b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b), IsD0Gpd (fun f : a $-> b => DHom f a' b')

forall (a b c : A * B) (g : b $-> c) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a)
(b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b) (c' : pointwise_prod DA DB c)
(g' : DHom g b' c'), IsD0Functor (cat_postcomp a g) (dcat_postcomp g')

forall (a b c : A * B) (f : a $-> b) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a)
(b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b) (c' : pointwise_prod DA DB c)
(f' : DHom f a' b'), IsD0Functor (cat_precomp c f) (dcat_precomp f')

forall (a b c d : A * B) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a) (b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b)
(c' : pointwise_prod DA DB c) (d' : pointwise_prod DA DB d)
(f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g b' c') (h' : DHom h c' d'),
DHom (cat_assoc f g h) (h' $o' g' $o' f') (h' $o' (g' $o' f'))

forall (a b c d : A * B) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a) (b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b)
(c' : pointwise_prod DA DB c) (d' : pointwise_prod DA DB d)
(f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g b' c') (h' : DHom h c' d'),
DHom (cat_assoc_opp f g h) (h' $o' (g' $o' f')) (h' $o' g' $o' f')

forall (a b : A * B) (f : a $-> b) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a)
(b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b) (f' : DHom f a' b'),
DHom (cat_idl f) (DId b' $o' f') f'

forall (a b : A * B) (f : a $-> b) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a)
(b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b) (f' : DHom f a' b'),
DHom (cat_idr f) (f' $o' DId a') f'

forall (a b : A * B) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a)
(b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b), IsD01Cat (fun f : a $-> b => DHom f a' b')
IsD01Cat (fun f : ab1 $-> ab2 => DHom f ab1' ab2')

forall (a b : A * B) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a)
(b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b), IsD0Gpd (fun f : a $-> b => DHom f a' b')

(b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b) (c' : pointwise_prod DA DB c)
(g' : DHom g b' c'), IsD0Functor (cat_postcomp a g) (dcat_postcomp g')

contents: intros ab1 ab2 ab3 fg ab1' ab2' ab3' [f' g'].

goals.conclusion: IsD0Functor (cat_postcomp ab1 fg) (dcat_postcomp (f', g'))

contents: intros hk1 hk2 pq hk1' hk2' [p' q'].

goals.conclusion:
DHom (fmap (cat_postcomp ab1 fg) pq) (dcat_postcomp (f', g') hk1 hk1')
  (dcat_postcomp (f', g') hk2 hk2')

forall (a b c : A * B) (f : a $-> b) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a)
(b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b) (c' : pointwise_prod DA DB c)
(f' : DHom f a' b'), IsD0Functor (cat_precomp c f) (dcat_precomp f')

contents: intros ab1 ab2 ab3 fg ab1' ab2' ab3' [f' g'].

goals.conclusion: IsD0Functor (cat_precomp ab3 fg) (dcat_precomp (f', g'))

contents: intros hk1 hk2 pq hk1' hk2' [p' q'].

goals.conclusion:
DHom (fmap (cat_precomp ab3 fg) pq) (dcat_precomp (f', g') hk1 hk1')
  (dcat_precomp (f', g') hk2 hk2')

forall (a b c d : A * B) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a) (b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b)
(c' : pointwise_prod DA DB c) (d' : pointwise_prod DA DB d)
(f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g b' c') (h' : DHom h c' d'),
DHom (cat_assoc f g h) (h' $o' g' $o' f') (h' $o' (g' $o' f'))

contents: intros ab1 ab2 ab3 ab4 fg1 fg2 fg3.

goals.conclusion:
forall (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB ab1) (b' : pointwise_prod DA DB ab2)
(c' : pointwise_prod DA DB ab3) (d' : pointwise_prod DA DB ab4)
(f' : DHom fg1 a' b') (g' : DHom fg2 b' c') (h' : DHom fg3 c' d'),
DHom (cat_assoc fg1 fg2 fg3) (h' $o' g' $o' f') (h' $o' (g' $o' f'))

contents: intros ab1' ab2' ab3' ab4' [f1' g1'] [f2' g2'] [f3' g3'].
exact (dcat_assoc f1' f2' f3', dcat_assoc g1' g2' g3').

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c d : A * B) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a) (b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b)
(c' : pointwise_prod DA DB c) (d' : pointwise_prod DA DB d)
(f' : DHom f a' b') (g' : DHom g b' c') (h' : DHom h c' d'),
DHom (cat_assoc_opp f g h) (h' $o' (g' $o' f')) (h' $o' g' $o' f')

contents: intros ab1 ab2 ab3 ab4 fg1 fg2 fg3.

goals.conclusion:
forall (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB ab1) (b' : pointwise_prod DA DB ab2)
(c' : pointwise_prod DA DB ab3) (d' : pointwise_prod DA DB ab4)
(f' : DHom fg1 a' b') (g' : DHom fg2 b' c') (h' : DHom fg3 c' d'),
DHom (cat_assoc_opp fg1 fg2 fg3) (h' $o' (g' $o' f')) (h' $o' g' $o' f')

contents: intros ab1' ab2' ab3' ab4' [f1' g1'] [f2' g2'] [f3' g3'].
exact (dcat_assoc_opp f1' f2' f3', dcat_assoc_opp g1' g2' g3').

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b : A * B) (f : a $-> b) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a)
(b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b) (f' : DHom f a' b'),
DHom (cat_idl f) (DId b' $o' f') f'

contents: intros ab1 ab2 fg ab1' ab2' [f' g'].

goals.conclusion: DHom (cat_idl fg) (DId ab2' $o' (f', g')) (f', g')

forall (a b : A * B) (f : a $-> b) (a' : pointwise_prod DA DB a)
(b' : pointwise_prod DA DB b) (f' : DHom f a' b'),
DHom (cat_idr f) (f' $o' DId a') f'

contents: intros ab1 ab2 fg ab1' ab2' [f' g'].

goals.conclusion: DHom (cat_idr fg) ((f', g') $o' DId ab1') (f', g')
